full_text:
Lü Ju (Shiyi) 呂據 (世議)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Ju (呂據), styledShiyi (世議). Second son of Lü Fan and an officer of Wu. Rebelled and killed by Sun Chen. Lü Ju was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lü Ju lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
